name: Apple Breakfast Fritters
recipeIngredient: artificial sweetener to equal 4 Tsp sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the apple and set aside.
2. Combine all ingredients except apple in a blender. Blend until the mixture is smooth.
3. Fold in the grated apple; mix well.
4. Drop by tablespoons onto a hot nonstick skillet, or pour out 1 large fritter.
5. Cook on both sides to a golden brown.
6. Makes 1 serving. Counts as 1 bread, 1 egg, 1 fruit.
Variations:
Blueberry Pancakes: Omit the apple. Fold 1/2 cup crushed blueberries into the blended egg-bread mixture. Bake as stated.
Pineapple Fritters: Omit the apple. Fold 2 slices of canned pineapple cut into very small pieces into the blended egg-bread mixture. Bake as stated. Pineapple Fritters were my favorite.
